props.name: children
props.description: Content to customize the full button body.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the base component.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon displayed before the placeholder text.

props.name: onTrigger
props.description: Callback fired when the component is activated by click or keyboard shortcut.

props.name: preventDefault
props.description: Prevent the browser's default behavior when the configured shortcut matches.

props.name: shortcut
props.description: Comma-separated shortcut list. The component matches all configured shortcuts and renders the platform-preferred one.
